cards.title: Acupuncture Therapeutics
cards._legacyHtml:
📋 Content Coming SoonThis card will contain:
  • Meridian system: 12 primary + 8 extraordinary
  • Key points: ST36, LI4, SP6, LV3, PC6, HT7
  • Needling technique: Depth, angle, De Qi sensation
  • Evidence-based conditions: Chronic pain, nausea, headache
  • Session protocols: Frequency, duration, course of treatment
